statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); dir_display="${dir/#$HOME/\~}"; time=$(date +%R); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.id'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); usage_display=""; if [ -n "$used" ]; then used_rounded=$(printf "%.1f" "$used"); usage_display=" $(printf '\033[38;2;255;255;255m\033[48;2;51;101;138m') ${used_rounded}% used $(printf '\033[0m')"; fi; git_info=""; if git -C "$dir" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$dir" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then status=""; ! git -C "$dir" --no-optional-locks diff --quiet 2>/dev/null && status="${status}*"; ! git -C "$dir" --no-optional-locks diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null && status="${status}+"; [ -n "$(git -C "$dir" --no-optional-locks ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null)" ] && status="${status}?"; [ -n "$status" ] && status=" $status"; git_info=" $(printf '\033[38;2;0;0;0m\033[48;2;252;161;125m') $branch$status $(printf '\033[0m')"; fi; fi; dir_display_formatted=" $(printf '\033[38;2;255;255;255m\033[48;2;79;134;153m') $dir_display $(printf '\033[0m')"; model_display=" $(printf '\033[38;2;255;255;255m\033[48;2;95;95;135m') $model $(printf '\033[0m')"; time_display=" $(printf '\033[38;2;255;255;255m\033[48;2;51;101;138m') ♥ $time $(printf '\033[0m')"; echo "${git_info}${dir_display_formatted}${model_display}${usage_display}${time_display}"
